landing.heroTitle: the free, fun, and effective way to master chess!
landing.heroSubtitle: Learn chess with AI-powered lessons, puzzles, and personalized coaching.

whyWorks.title: why chesster works
whyWorks.subtitle: Our scientifically-proven methods help you learn chess faster and retain knowledge longer.
whyWorks.effectiveDesc: Our lessons are designed by chess masters and backed by learning science. You'll see real improvement in your game.
whyWorks.funEngagingDesc: Earn XP, unlock achievements, and compete with friends. Learning chess has never been this enjoyable.
whyWorks.personalizedDesc: AI adapts to your skill level and learning style. Every lesson is tailored specifically for you.
whyWorks.freeDesc: Access all core features for free. Premium is optional and only for those who want extra perks.

howItWorks.title: start learning in minutes
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds. No credit card required. Start your chess journey immediately.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our AI evaluates your current skill level to personalize your learning path.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Complete bite-sized lessons, solve puzzles, and track your progress. Just 15 minutes a day!

explore.title: explore chesster
explore.coursesDesc: Structured lessons from beginner to master
explore.puzzlesDesc: Sharpen your tactics with daily challenges
explore.analysisDesc: Deep dive into any position with AI
explore.gameReviewDesc: Learn from your games with AI feedback

testimonials.title: loved by chess players
testimonials.quote1: I went from 800 to 1400 rating in just 3 months!
testimonials.quote2: The AI tutor explains concepts better than any book I've read.
testimonials.quote3: Finally, a chess app that makes learning fun and not intimidating.
testimonials.quote4: My kid went from not knowing the rules to winning school tournaments in 6 months!
testimonials.quote5: The puzzles are addictive. I solve 20 a day now and my tactical vision improved dramatically.
testimonials.quote6: Best free chess resource out there. The AI analysis is surprisingly accurate.

cta.title: ready to become a chess master?
cta.subtitle: Join our community of learners and start your journey today. It's free!

footer.tagline: The free, fun, and effective way to learn chess.

chat.title: Chesster
chat.descBuddyAnalysis: 🤔 Let's look at this position together (I might miss things too!)
chat.descChat: ♟️ Just chatting about chess - no pressure, no perfect answers
chat.descPuzzle: 🧩 Let's figure this puzzle out together!
chat.descGame: 🎮 I'm here to brainstorm moves with you
chat.welcomePlay: Hey! Let's figure out some good moves together
chat.welcomePuzzle: Ready to tackle this puzzle with you!
chat.subtitlePlay: I'll share my thoughts on moves and positions.
chat.subtitlePuzzle: Let's work on this puzzle together! I might not get it right the first time, but that's part of the fun.
chat.subtitleSession: I'll take a look at your position and share what I'm thinking.
chat.subtitleChat: Let's chat about chess! I'm just a fellow chess enthusiast.
chat.disclaimer: ⚠️ Friendly reminder: I can make mistakes and miss things just like a human! Always double-check important moves, especially in real games. I am here to help you think through positions, not replace your own judgment.
chat.quickStart: Quick start - try one of these:
chat.placeholderSession: What's on your mind about this position?
chat.promptSilman: How does Silman's imbalances apply here?
chat.promptFine: How does Fine's chess principles apply here?
chat.promptGoodBad: Is this looking good or bad?
chat.promptGutFeeling: What's your gut feeling about this position?
chat.promptFeelsRight: Which move feels right to you?
chat.promptWhatThink: What do you think about this position?
chat.promptPuzzleApproach: How would you approach this puzzle?
chat.promptNudge: Can you give me a nudge in the right direction?
chat.promptAttack: Time to attack or be patient?
chat.promptThreat: How do I handle this threat?
chat.promptPawns: Push the pawns or hold back?
chat.promptDevelop: What piece should I develop next?
chat.promptImprove: How do I get better at chess?
chat.promptStratVsTact: What's the difference between strategy and tactics?
chat.promptPrinciples: What are the key chess principles?
chat.promptPositionalVsTactical: Positional vs tactical play - what's the deal?
chat.promptOpeningMistakes: What opening mistakes should I avoid?
chat.promptKingSafety: How do I keep my king safe?
chat.promptPatterns: How can I recognize patterns better?
chat.voiceUnavailable: Voice input is not available in this browser
chat.aiModelDescription: Powered by server-managed Anthropic API. No configuration required!
chat.fontSizeDescription: Adjust text size for better readability

marketing.metaTitle: Chesster for Schools — Launch your branded chess platform
marketing.metaDescription: Run your own white-label chess school. Logo, colors, domain, students invited — in 15 minutes.
marketing.heading: Your school. Your brand. Live in 15 minutes.
marketing.lede: Chesster powers chess academies that want a real product, not a spreadsheet. Pick a subdomain, drop in your logo, invite your students — and your platform is live.
marketing.pillarBrandedDesc: Your logo, colors, and domain. Parents see your school.
marketing.pillarSelfServeDesc: No demo calls. Sign up, pay, invite students — same session.
marketing.pillarGuaranteeDesc: Try the full platform risk-free. Cancel any time.

account.notSignedInTitle: You're 4 minutes away from a branded chess platform.

account.signUpButton: Sign up with email or Google
account.reassurance: We never sell your data. 30-day money-back guarantee.
account.signedInSubtitle: Tell us a bit about you so support can reach out when needed.
account.phoneHelp: Only used by support for WhatsApp activation in Kazakhstan.

school.title: What's your school called?

payment.subtitlePaid: Your school is being activated — continue to make it yours.
payment.subtitleUnpaid: Whop handles the card. Cancel any time within 30 days for a full refund.
payment.guarantee: 🛡️ 30-day money-back guarantee. We'll redirect you to Whop's secure checkout, then back here.

brand.title: Make it yours.
brand.subtitle: Brand colors apply live. Skip what you don't need — you can always edit later.
brand.heroDefault: Welcome to {schoolName} — your chess journey starts here.
brand.customDomainHelp: You'll set up DNS in /admin/settings/domain after onboarding. The CNAME instructions are auto-generated there.
